creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rakuco
Date: Wed Dec 26 20:25:18 2012
New Revision: 309532
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309532

Log:
  - Set PORTSCOUT to prevent wrong reports. [1]
  - Trim Makefile header.
  
  PR:		ports/174250 [1]
  Submitted by:	Gregory Sutter <gsutter@zer0.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/junkfilter/Makefile

Modified: head/mail/junkfilter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/junkfilter/Makefile	Wed Dec 26 19:28:21 2012	(r309531)
+++ head/mail/junkfilter/Makefile	Wed Dec 26 20:25:18 2012	(r309532)
@@ -1,10 +1,5 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	junkfilter
-# Date created:				20000523
-# Whom:					Gregory Sutter <gsutter@zer0.org>
-
-#
+# Created by: Gregory Sutter <gsutter@zer0.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	junkfilter
 PORTVERSION=	20030115
@@ -18,6 +13,8 @@ DISTFILES=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}${E
 MAINTAINER=	gsutter@zer0.org
 COMMENT=	Spam filtering software for procmail
 
+PORTSCOUT=	limit:^20
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	procmail:${PORTSDIR}/mail/procmail
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
